summary: OCB TITAN AI testing completed. All 28 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend login and navigation working correctly for all 3 databases (OCB GROUP, OCB UNIT 4 MPC & MP3, OCB UNIT 1 RITAIL). Master ERP forms (Shift, Jabatan, Lokasi Absensi, Payroll Rules) have working Save buttons. Some console 404 errors in frontend are due to API calls being made before auth token is set - minor frontend timing issue.

integration_issues.issue: 404 errors when fetching /api/branches and /api/jabatan on pages like Employees, Absensi - API calls happening before auth token set in axios
integration_issues.note: APIs work when token is present - timing issue on frontend

action_items: Optional: Fix frontend timing issue - ensure axios interceptors set auth token before API calls on protected pages
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_multi_db_login_features.py - New comprehensive test file for multi-database login and features

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All main flows working, minor console errors on initial load

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed data during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-database login fully working. Tests cover: switch database, ensure-admin, login for all 3 DBs, Master Shift/Jabatan/Lokasi/Payroll create, Employee CRUD, CRM Customer create & analyze, HR Training, Attendance approval, Mass upload template download, Export/Import system.

mocked_apis.WhatsApp sending: Alerts are queued but not actually sent

tests: POST /api/business/switch/{db_name} - Switch to ocb_titan, ocb_unit_4, ocb_unt_1
POST /api/business/ensure-admin/{db_name} - Create admin in all 3 DBs
POST /api/auth/login - Login successful to all 3 databases
POST /api/files/products/photo endpoint exists and accepts file uploads
Click OCB GROUP opens login form
Navigate to HR & Payroll > Master Shift
Form has Kode, Nama Shift, Jam Masuk, Jam Pulang, Istirahat fields
